title: BEM-884 operational rules
objective:
Run script:
"""
Path('governance/rules').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

rr = Path('governance/state/rule_registry.json')
data = json.loads(rr.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if rr.exists() else {'status':'active','canonical_term':'реестр правил','purpose':'operational rules','rules':[],'conflict_policy':'merge duplicates'}
existing = {r.get('id') for r in data.get('rules', [])}
new_rules = [
 {'id':'RULE-004','owner':'OBJ-WRK-001','scope':'registry_validation','condition':'before a registry is accepted or changed','approved_action':'run validate_registries and attach proof','prohibited_action':'mark registry PASS without schema validation','version':'1.0','source_incident':'BEM-882 readiness audit'},
 {'id':'RULE-005','owner':'OBJ-WRK-001','scope':'workspace_promotion','condition':'artifact moves from development to testing or main workspace','approved_action':'record promotion and validation result','prohibited_action':'copy artifact to main workspace without PASS proof','version':'1.0','source_incident':'BEM-882 readiness audit'},
 {'id':'RULE-006','owner':'OBJ-DIR-001','scope':'managed_channel','condition':'object-to-object exchange','approved_action':'use curator-to-curator message envelope','prohibited_action':'low-level element sends external object message directly','version':'1.0','source_incident':'BEM-880 channel baseline'},
 {'id':'RULE-007','owner':'OBJ-DIR-001','scope':'rule_update','condition':'new incident proposes a rule change','approved_action':'deduplicate, version, record source incident and owner','prohibited_action':'create conflicting duplicate rule','version':'1.0','source_incident':'operator protocol v1.6'},
 {'id':'RULE-008','owner':'OBJ-WRK-001','scope':'testing_assignment','condition':'combined result needs testing','approved_action':'curator assigns a non-authoring contour when possible','prohibited_action':'authoring contour approves its own candidate as final without independent check','version':'1.0','source_incident':'operator protocol v1.7'},
 {'id':'RULE-009','owner':'OBJ-GD-001','scope':'director_governance','condition':'multiple directors or direction-level conflict','approved_action':'general director curator resolves or escalates to operator if strategic','prohibited_action':'director unilaterally changes global policy','version':'1.0','source_incident':'operator protocol v1.6'},
 {'id':'RULE-010','owner':'OBJ-WRK-001','scope':'product_repository_feedback','condition':'product repository returns incident, fix or improvement','approved_action':'clean feedback through curator and propose rule/update','prohibited_action':'apply product-specific workaround globally without analysis','version':'1.0','source_incident':'BEM-880 product repository model'},
 {'id':'RULE-011','owner':'OBJ-WRK-001','scope':'evidence','condition':'task is marked completed','approved_action':'attach proof file or changed artifact path','prohibited_action':'claim PASS without evidence','version':'1.0','source_incident':'auditor contract'},
 {'id':'RULE-012','owner':'OBJ-WRK-001','scope':'continuity','condition':'after task/report completion','approved_action':'continue to next backlog item without waiting unless operator decision is required','prohibited_action':'stop roadmap after status report','version':'1.0','source_incident':'operator reminder after BEM-882'}
]
for r in new_rules:
    if r['id'] not in existing:
        data.setdefault('rules', []).append(r)
data['status'] = 'active'
data['operational_seed'] = 'BEM-884'
rr.write_text(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

lines = ['# BEM-884 Operational rule seed', '', 'Status: COMPLETED', '', 'Added operational rules:']
for r in new_rules:
    lines.append('- ' + r['id'] + ' | ' + r['scope'] + ' | owner: ' + r['owner'])
Path('governance/rules/BEM884_OPERATIONAL_RULE_SEED.md').write_text('\n'.join(lines) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')

errors = []
ids = set()
for r in data.get('rules', []):
    for field in ['id','owner','scope','condition','approved_action','prohibited_action','version']:
        if field not in r:
            errors.append(r.get('id','unknown') + ': missing ' + field)
    if r.get('id') in ids:
        errors.append('duplicate rule id ' + str(r.get('id')))
    ids.add(r.get('id'))
status = 'PASS' if not errors else 'FAIL'
report = '# BEM-884 Operational rules validation\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nTotal rules: ' + str(len(data.get('rules', []))) + '\n\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n'
Path('governance/reports/BEM884_OPERATIONAL_RULES.md').write_text(report, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM884_OPERATIONAL_RULES_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-884 operational rules proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nTotal rules: ' + str(len(data.get('rules', []))) + '\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')

backlog = Path('governance/backlog/BEM882_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json')
if backlog.exists():
    b = json.loads(backlog.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    for item in b.get('items', []):
        if item.get('id') == 'BEM-882-002':
            item['status'] = 'completed'
            item['proof'] = str(marker)
        elif 'status' not in item:
            item['status'] = 'pending'
    backlog.write_text(json.dumps(b, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

changed_files.extend(['governance/state/rule_registry.json','governance/rules/BEM884_OPERATIONAL_RULE_SEED.md','governance/reports/BEM884_OPERATIONAL_RULES.md',str(marker),'governance/backlog/BEM882_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json'])
ops_applied.append('BEM884 operational rules ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
